task_library	CREATE TABLE `task_library` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `competencia` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `nome` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `resumo` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `o_que_fazer` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `o_que_ganha` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `isActive` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=60001
